data.title: What's Going On With Globalstar Stock Wednesday?
data.description: Globalstar Inc (AMEX:GSAT) shares are trading higher Wednesday. The company announced a partnership with Parsons Corp (NYSE:PSN) to support the public, government and defense sectors.
